name: Sayur Lodeh (Curried Vegetables)
recipeIngredient: 225 grams Shelled fresh or frozen shrimp, cut into thin slices
225 grams String beans, trimmed of strings and cut into 3 pieces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add onion and sauté lightly until translucent.
2. Add garlic and coriander. Stir fry for 1 minute.
3. Add Laos paste and stir fry for another minute.
4. Add shrimp and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add red chili, cabbage, cauliflower, carrot, string beans, and eggplant. Mix well.
6. Season with salt to taste.
7. Cover the pan and simmer over low heat for about 10 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
8. Stir in coconut milk and salam leaf. Cook uncovered, stirring almost continuously until everything is heated through.
9. Serve hot with rice.
